title: Login Issue
description: Customer unable to login with correct credentials.

title: Payment Failure
description: Payment not processing through credit card.

title: Account Verification Delay
description: Verification email not received by customer.

title: Bug in Dashboard
description: Graphs not loading correctly on the dashboard.

title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: PDF invoice download button throws error.

title: App Crash on Mobile
description: Mobile app crashes when opening notifications tab.

title: Feature Request: Dark Mode
description: Customer requested dark mode for the app.

title: Email Notifications Not Received
description: Automated emails not reaching customer's inbox.

title: Profile Picture Upload Issue
description: Unable to upload profile picture larger than 5MB.

title: Slow Page Loading
description: Pages take longer than expected to load.
